g.text: (This may take 30-60 seconds on first load)
All creatures trust you. All repair materials in inventory.
A survival game on Saturn's moon Enceladus
Your ship lies crumpled in a shallow crater, venting steam into the thin atmosphere. Debris is scattered across the ice.
